case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. HUNG TRAN et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF INTENTION TO OFFER PREPARED TESTIMONY IN LIEU OF DIRECT TESTIMONY AND DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 98 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-30-2014.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-24-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRAN, ANH-HUNG
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MARK ISAAC SCHICKMAN.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED FEB-13-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, HUNG AKA HUNG T TRAN
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TRAN, ANH-HUNG JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR PETER RUCKER BOUTIN.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, HUNG AKA HUNG T TRAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2014
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-20-2014. THE SEP-24-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR FRED L KURLANDER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-31-2014 THROUGH JAN-29-2015.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 56580119)
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF OCT-31-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE.
